title: Granicus Environment Contract
description: Defines environment variables set by PythonRunner (and ShellRunner) when launching subprocess assets, plus the metadata output shape written back to Go.

GRANICUS_ASSET_NAME.description: Name of the asset being executed.

GRANICUS_RUN_ID.description: Unique identifier for this pipeline run.

GRANICUS_PROJECT_ROOT.description: Absolute path to the pipeline project root directory.

GRANICUS_METADATA_PATH.description: Absolute path to the temp JSON file where the subprocess writes MetadataOutput back to Go.

GRANICUS_INTERVAL_START.description: ISO 8601 datetime marking the start of the execution interval. Present only for scheduled runs.

GRANICUS_INTERVAL_END.description: ISO 8601 datetime marking the end (exclusive) of the execution interval. Present only for scheduled runs.

GRANICUS_DEST_RESOURCE.description: JSON-encoded destination ResourceConfig. Must parse to a ResourceConfig object.

GRANICUS_SOURCE_RESOURCE.description: JSON-encoded source ResourceConfig. Must parse to a ResourceConfig object.

GRANICUS_REFS.description: JSON-encoded map of dependency asset name to resolved table reference (e.g. project.dataset.table).

ResourceConfig.title: ResourceConfig
ResourceConfig.description: Parsed shape of GRANICUS_DEST_RESOURCE and GRANICUS_SOURCE_RESOURCE.

name.description: Connection name as defined in pipeline config.

type.description: Backend type identifier (e.g. bigquery, postgres, duckdb).

additionalProperties.description: Arbitrary string properties forwarded from pipeline connection config.

RefsMap.title: RefsMap
RefsMap.description: Parsed shape of GRANICUS_REFS. Maps dependency asset name to fully-qualified table reference.

MetadataOutput.title: MetadataOutput
MetadataOutput.description: Shape of the JSON file written by the subprocess to GRANICUS_METADATA_PATH. All fields are optional; Go merges whatever is present.

rows_affected.description: Number of rows inserted, updated, or deleted by the primary operation.

tables_created.description: Names of tables created or replaced during the run.

duration_seconds.description: Wall-clock duration of the subprocess work in seconds.

rows_loaded.description: Number of rows loaded in load operations (e.g. GCS -> BQ).

load_duration.description: Duration of the load phase in seconds.

x-extensions.description: Non-standard GRANICUS_* variables found in Python scripts. These are NOT set by PythonRunner; individual scripts set or consume them outside the standard contract.

GRANICUS_GCS_BUCKET.description: GCS bucket name used by scripts that read from or write to Google Cloud Storage. Set by the calling environment, not by PythonRunner.

GRANICUS_GCS_PREFIX.description: GCS object key prefix used alongside GRANICUS_GCS_BUCKET. Set by the calling environment, not by PythonRunner.

GRANICUS_PIPELINE_DIR.description: Absolute path to the specific pipeline subdirectory. Some scripts set this themselves derived from GRANICUS_PROJECT_ROOT; not injected by PythonRunner.
